## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**PART_GEN_FRAGMENT** -> PART_GEN_OPTIONS (CAT_CD->CAT_CD, PROD_GROUP->PROD_GROUP); RTR_CUT_SHAPE (CUT_PROPERTY -> SHAPE_CODE); UM_CODES (INV_UM->CODE, ISS_UM->CODE, PUR_UM->CODE)

**PART_GEN_HISTORY** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (INV_PART -> PART); LOCATION_ADDRESS (LOCN -> LOCN); PART_GEN_FRAGMENT (PART -> PART_FRAGMENT)

**PART_MRP_DESCR** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); LOCATION_ADDRESS (LOC -> LOCN)

**PART_NOTES** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (PART -> PART); LOCATION_ADDRESS (LOCN -> LOCN)

**PART_XREF_USER** -> INV_CROSS_REF (CUST->CUSTOMER, CUST_PART->CUSTOMER_PART, LOCN->LOCATION, MFG_PART->MFG_PART, PART->PART, VENDOR->VENDOR)
